{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":9383},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7166235835888042786","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，细水流长，可以忙里偷闲着看。也不用那么赶。作者细节描写不错，徐徐道来，古代生活宛在眼前。很勤快，更新的速度挺快"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668519367,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0RAWfUDKDiYfbFCJLQ2zXA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/045a66ad2e6e49d696396025de33ea23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787275&x-signature=LIX4dhbFcqSZzl0aeJAGIC31s0k%3D","user_id":"109974023897","user_name":"爱吃红薯的番薯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109974023897","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663461435,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info":{"abstract":"【改编短剧已上线】
现代SSS级研究员猝死穿越到大兴朝，身子一直体弱多病，养到六岁才被允许在地里捡稻穗，被晒的头脑发蒙的李景，觉得他这身体以后种地，有些悬，当即决定读书考科举，这他擅长，插秧还是交给专业的人吧！
第二年，彼时已取名李意卿的某人自诩身体康复，兴致勃勃要插秧。
“怎么脚痒痒的”李意卿脑子里闪过不好的预感，从水里抬起脚。
“嚯”
只见一只黑色蠕动的水蛭趴在他的脚趾缝里吸吮着。
“啊”李意卿抓着手里的稻苗快速跑上岸。
是时候头悬梁锥刺股了，他要把书都翻烂了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/83346fbe4262bfdf68ddaab6f09910da","author":"三层肚腩","author_id":"","book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_name":"穿成泥腿子，一路科举连中六元","book_short_name":"扶摇叩青云","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7140298586876707359","read_count":"39342","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1009451"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"456","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6a629eb94e8e3f48dc025771bd24f3dc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447406&x-signature=%2F3N0elDJBJvhlr%2FmxeVekECEoys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"606528247170867","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.7102168e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27102,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":197392},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4 ":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7223005150493967144","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"推荐推荐！！很好看，终于完结了，看书还是得看完结版，不然追更太累了，主要是时间长了看了后面忘了前面。全文叙述流畅，男主的光环就是他前世的学霸经历，将知识用到极致，利用古人的智慧集思广益，充分发挥了群体力量。看评论除了男主的感情线有的读者不太满意外，其他评论都还好。我觉得作者将书中的人物角色刻画得很丰满，能够很好的让读者代入其中，没有鸡毛蒜皮的小事，没有极品亲戚邻居，少了很多观书的不适感，我喜欢这样的文风～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681736976,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxh7dyCXHEfS0/TH+jVBQU0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/a5139fb454dc44e4b71eb59b53d2bf93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796309&x-signature=bwbXU1c4HnMCT5iPgYByBS5JplE%3D","user_id":"110668562841","user_name":"挠挠小狮子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110668562841","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info":{"abstract":"【改编短剧已上线】

":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7223131077827789620","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"放书架好久，终于完结了，连夜看完，果然没让人失望，男主有过目不忘的能力，以及弄出了很多现代的东西，不过作者也在文章开头就说了，男主是现代的研究员智商超高的那种，所以也不算出戏吧，全文看着很爽，另外皇家父子真的很搞笑[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681766391,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N93uhEkNJ9IFta3jkEyg74jGCl21Djbr7oQ4lfv+vKtB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/96aa1e037b4c46b8b03e67c4c810a4bc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790108&x-signature=0y8pgEn0hnCau5qQz%2Fq13FMtkh0%3D","user_id":"2151074300957303","user_name":"肥妞zyy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2151074300957303","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733066843,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info":{"abstract":"【改编短剧已上线】

,{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7210588270042809092","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢的一部小说:没有惊心动魄的内容，没奇葩人与亊，平平淡淡的，却有内涵，有内容有真实感的亲情与温馨，一章一章的看下去，没漏掉一节更没跳越去翻读，舒心愉情最大感受！给作者点大大个👍🏻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678846039,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"347100143159820"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.5788544e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":103467,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":179255,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7165587842410808068","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"三观正，很励志的一本书必须给作者点赞，虽是考试升学，家长里短的内容，人情很暖，知恩图报，懂得感恩，非常好，看得心里舒䏜，有继续看下去的欲望"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668369224,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6QW95R1z+39Oa8itDE7GEo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"347100143159820","user_name":"爱吃烤鲈鱼的江晓倏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"347100143159820","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info":{"abstract":"【改编短剧已上线】
现代SSS级研究员猝死穿越到大兴朝，身子一直体弱多病，养到六岁才被允许在地里捡稻穗，被晒的头脑发蒙的李景，觉得他这身体以后种地，有些悬，当即决定读书考科举，这他擅长，插秧还是交给专业的人吧！
第二年，彼时已取名李意卿的某人自诩身体康复，兴致勃勃要插秧。
“怎么脚痒痒的”李意卿脑子里闪过不好的预感，从水里抬起脚。
“嚯”
只见一只黑色蠕动的水蛭趴在他的脚趾缝里吸吮着。
“啊”李意卿抓着手里的稻苗快速跑上岸。
是时候头悬梁锥刺股了，他要把书都翻烂了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/83346fbe4262bfdf68ddaab6f09910da","author":"三层肚腩","author_id":"","book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_name":"穿成泥腿子，一路科举连中六元","book_short_name":"扶摇叩青云","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7140298586876707359","read_count":"39342","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1009451"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"456","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6a629eb94e8e3f48dc025771bd24f3dc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447406&x-signature=%2F3N0elDJBJvhlr%2FmxeVekECEoys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"606528247170867","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.2745478e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":35948,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":58693,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":109549},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_ty },{"comment":{"comment_id":"7172349671745438494","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，男主头脑冷静，聪敏，很少看男频书，看了这部还不错，看到最新，又去看了另外几部都没这部好看啊，男频文好多节奏都好快，每个阶段都一笔带过不生动，这部就还不错！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669942892,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZJNTg6Hq8Rto/3irBGNEIHzHCG8gGICaQC9YYhXe4a","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9aaa1b5e083b476ab80e00d79ce3d557~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792021&x-signature=Rzu44WOA3MUeovUFnYINTRHlmvM%3D","user_id":"1399021704853128","user_name":"姑姑0913"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1399021704853128","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info":{"abstract":"【改编短剧已上线】
现代SSS级研究员猝死穿越到大兴朝，身子一直体弱多病，养到六岁才被允许在地里捡稻穗，被晒的头脑发蒙的李景，觉得他这身体以后种地，有些悬，当即决定读书考科举，这他擅长，插秧还是交给专业的人吧！
第二年，彼时已取名李意卿的某人自诩身体康复，兴致勃勃要插秧。
“怎么脚痒痒的”李意卿脑子里闪过不好的预感，从水里抬起脚。
“嚯”
只见一只黑色蠕动的水蛭趴在他的脚趾缝里吸吮着。
“啊”李意卿抓着手里的稻苗快速跑上岸。

e":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7181125689918505743","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了60章。
主角智商在线，文笔在线，文章没有bug。剧情并不新颖但有亮点。有点耐心就可以一直读下去。
个人感觉前期节奏把控的并不好。小三元那段，时间跳跃过快，对比前面一下子几个月。且目前并没有发现对于恶人的刻画，主角过的太顺畅了。虽然我不喜欢虐主但是这个太平静，平静的让我害怕主角被害。
后面我还没看，挺期待的。
推荐程度4.2星。(值得一看！)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671986328,"group_id":"7140298516194135076","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你就看吧，一看一个不吱声","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Dn+ndH79IV7E9RisWh6AwbjxIfElrzIAR3IuT9Vd1E","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6ceba3398b6648bf81c577ba408fef53~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788842&x-signature=orC6sEhstGYeqyMFUueOO31GHiQ%3D","user_id":"2185469049715463","user_name":"不不夷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2185469049715463","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1668656639,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7140298516194135076","book_info":{"abstract":"【改编短剧已上线】
